jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates:
Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates!
